title: Flowery Potatoes
description: This simply texture pack gives fresh look to potatoes crop!
body:
## Doesn't need anything additionally to make it work!

#### Well I don't think the OG potatoes crop is bad or anything like that, buuuuut it gives a little bit of freshness to the game

this texture pack isn't for everyone but I personally love the the brand new potatoes crop texture _It's also a little bit easier to tell when crop is ready for harvest_

### Instructions how to use for dummies:
1. Just Install it
2. Put it in the texture pack folder
3. Turn it on and you good to go!
